case_title: KHANH THAI NGUYEN et al VS. ATA MANNEH et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, KHANH THAI CHONGKASEM, JAMAREE AS TO DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA MANNEH, MARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $70.00) SERVED MAR-04-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $70.00) SERVED FEB-22-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MANNEH, MARY
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA HEARING SET FOR MAY-10-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY ATA MANNEH, MARY MANNEH IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUN-23-2010 AT 3:30 PM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ATA MANNEH, ONLY.COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA; NOT REPORTED (506)
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA MANNEH, MARY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. CO-PLAINTIFF AND CO-DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA HO FILED BY NGUYEN, KHANH THAI CHONGKASEM, JAMAREE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2010 - JUDGMENT.
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR TRUST TAG 26308 BY DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-07-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF(S) ONLY. PLAINTIFF(S) EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KHANH THAI CHONGKASEM, JAMAREE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA MANNEH, MARY $914.00 PRINCIPAL, $220.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,134.00, DEFENDANTS COMPLIED WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5(G)(1) BY RETURNING THE DEPOSIT WITHIN 21 DAYS OF TENANTS MOVE-OUT. HOWEVER, DEFENDANTS FAILED TO PROVID ACTUAL RECEIPTS FOR ALL REPAIRS MADE, PROVIDING "ESTIMATES" INSTEAD. PLAINTIFF;S REQUEST FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COST OF FLIGHT FORM D.C. TO CALIFORNIA TO ATTEND COURT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF COULD HAVE SOUGT PERMISSION TO APPEAR FOR COURT TELEPHONICALLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $1,719.50 RE 26308 FOR TRANSACTION W0510721D004 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO KHANH THAI NGUYEN & J CHONGKASEM, DOC 1903112499, WARRANT #38200101, DATED SEP-07-2010

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KHANH THAI CHONGKASEM, JAMAREE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANNEH, ATA MANNEH, MARY $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $219.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,719.50, THE DAMAGES AWARDED ARE IN ADDITION TO THE AMOUNT PREVIOUSLY TENDERED BY DEFENDANT AS A PARTIAL REFUND OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KHANH THAI
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KHANH THAI CHONGKASEM, JAMAREE
COPYING FEES (4 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, KHANH THAI
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS RECEIVED VIA MAIL AND FILED. COPY FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING DEPT. FOR PROCESS.
